name: A Multimodal Dataset for Large Language Model Applications in the Energy Domain
summary: arXiv:2607.11459v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents the mAIEnergy dataset, an open-access, multimodal corpus developed to support Large Language Model (LLM) applications in the en...
description: arXiv:2607.11459v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents the mAIEnergy dataset, an open-access, multimodal corpus developed to support Large Language Model (LLM) applications in the energy sector. The dataset integrates approximately 50,000 textual documents, 20,000 images, 25 million numerical time series records, and 2 million geospatial and relational data entries. It includes p...
author: Costas Mylonas, Magda Foti
